data.current_summary: Account eligibility for debit ACH transactions
data.summary_suggestion: Validate account eligibility for ACH debit transactions
data.description_suggestion: Validates whether a specified account is eligible to receive debit ACH (Automated Clearing House) transactions. Requires the debtor account details and associated financial institution information as input. Returns validation status, account ownership information (associatedName), and any applicable status reason details. This operation confirms account validity and ownership before processing ACH transactions.
